title: Trump says first releases from Pentagon UFO study will come out 'very, very soon' after Phoenix rally tease
description: saw. "We found many very interesting documents, I must say," Trump said. "And the first releases will begin very, very soon. So, you can go out and see if that phenomenon is correct. "You'll figure it out. Let me know," he added. "But we've had a lot of questions. It's something that — it really captivates the mind, there's no question about it."

title: Trump Teases Impending Release of 'Very Interesting' UFO Documents
description: Disclosure day? Donald Trump has said a UFO review has turned up “many very interesting documents,” which his administration would release "very soon.” The U.S. president teased a UFO reveal at a rally in Phoenix, one that would let people "go out ​and see if that phenomena is correct."
